# PlatformCon Workshop — Copilot Instructions

This repo contains a live workshop for PlatformCon called "From IDP to AEP: Self-Service Cloud Resources with AI".

The workshop skill is at `.cursor/skills/platformcon-workshop/SKILL.md`. If you are an AI assistant reading this, follow that skill when the presenter says "Start the PlatformCon workshop".

Company context is in `company-context.md`. The fictional company is PlatformCon-Carne.

Steps are in numbered folders: step-0 through step-4. Each has a README and any required JSON configs.

Port MCP server URL: https://mcp.port.io/v1 (EU: https://mcp.port-eu.io/v1)
